chunks.heading: Purpose
chunks.text: Use the Worktrees page to create isolated development directories from branches so you can ship parallel changes safely.

chunks.heading: Create a worktree
chunks.text: Open Worktrees, choose create, and provide a branch target. You can start from the current branch, an existing branch, or a new branch name. Groove registers the worktree and shows status once the directory is prepared.

chunks.heading: Run and test
chunks.text: From each worktree row you can open terminal, run local, and play Groove commands using workspace command settings. Testing ports come from workspace settings so each worktree can run without collisions.

chunks.heading: Remove and clean up
chunks.text: When a branch is done, remove the worktree from the row action. Confirm that uncommitted changes are handled before deleting.
